title: John Paulson says we are in the early stages of a long-term bull market for gold
description: He said demand for bullion continues to broaden, led by central banks that have been adding to their reserves alongside growing private-sector interest.

title: Kalshi launches election hub for prediction markets ahead of midterms
description: The company said the page gives viewers of its event contracts a central place to see speculators' outlook for the midterm elections.

title: Goldman Sachs creates private markets platform as rich investors seek the next SpaceX and Stripe
description: Goldman Sachs is launching a new alternative investments platform aimed at giving wealthy clients and family offices direct stakes in private companies.

title: Bets against SpaceX grow to 32% of float as Elon Musk warns short sellers won't survive
description: About 206 million SpaceX shares are now sold short, representing roughly 32% of the company's publicly tradable float, according to S3.

title: As the U.S.-Iran war heats up again, these parts of the stock market and economy could be affected
description: Investors and economists are deliberating what the latest exchange in hostilities will mean for the broader economy.

title: Jamie Dimon says markets underestimate risks and he wouldn't buy stocks or Treasurys at current prices
description: Comments from JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon contrast with investors' recent willingness to look past wars, tariffs and other shocks.

title: Capital One bet big on Discover. Now it must prove the gamble was worth it
description: Tuesday evening's second-quarter earnings report is the perfect stage to do just that.

title: Coinbase trading results may fall short of expectations, according to prediction markets
description: Speculators think in the company's second quarter earnings report, it will show trading volume fell for a third consecutive quarter.

title: China's car market heads for worst year since 2021 as sales plunge 20%
description: Consumer demand for cars in China tumbles following record-high sales of 23.7 million units in 2025.

title: Kalshi adds 3 million new users as prediction market capitalizes on the World Cup
description: The prediction market has launched some ads featuring soccer players, as well as formed a partnership to display its brand in more places during the tournament.

title: 'WarshGPT': How Wall Street is adapting to the Fed's new era of communication
description: Investment firms are readying for an era with less public commentary from the U.S. central bank. Some are relying on AI for an edge.

title: India's biggest IPO this year rakes in bids worth $31 billion, powered by institutional frenzy
description: The IPO of India's largest asset manager closed on Thursday, drawing keen interest from institutional investors.

title: Dallas Fed President Logan calls for 'modestly' higher interest rates
description: The policymaker said this week's good inflation news wasn't good enough.

title: Short sellers load up against SpaceX as stock drops below IPO price
description: About 185 million SpaceX shares are now sold short, representing roughly 29% of the company's publicly tradable float, according to S3.

title: Sen. Warren says Trump's CFPB overhaul has cost Americans $26.5 billion
description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren says the Trump administration's rollback of CFPB rules and enforcement has cost Americans up to $26.5 billion so far.

title: Anthropic moves closer to mega-IPO as bankers line up investor meetings
description: Anthropic is lining up investor meetings ahead of a potential IPO as soon as October as the AI startup behind looks to beat rival OpenAI to the public markets.

title: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's testimony to Senate banking committee hits on economy, interest rates
description: As part of congressionally mandated Capitol Hill appearances for the central bank leader, Warsh spoke Tuesday to the House financial services committee.

title: ‘Arsenal of democracy’: Jamie Dimon announces $24 million effort to boost American shipbuilding
description: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon unveiled a $24 million package to bolster American shipbuilding, funding a new submarine facility at the Philadelphia Navy Yard.

title: Warren Buffett on the market today: 'It's tough to find values when everybody is preferring gambling'
description: The investor has been sharply critical of the stock market, one that he says is increasingly defined by speculative trading as opposed to long-term investing.

title: New York Fed President Williams says inflation has peaked, rates 'well positioned'
description: Williams cited five reasons why he expects the latest price surge has run its course.
